auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Recruiterflow API key sent with the RF-Api-Key header. Request a workspace API key from Recruiterflow support through in-app chat or help@recruiterflow.com; see the official API setup article: https://help.recruiterflow.com/en/articles/3671870-build-a-custom-careers-page-with-the-recruiterflow-api.

actions.name: get_candidate
actions.description: Get one Recruiterflow candidate by prospect ID.

candidateId.description: The Recruiterflow candidate or prospect identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving a Recruiterflow candidate.

candidate.description: One raw Recruiterflow record returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a Recruiterflow candidate.

actions.name: get_job
actions.description: Get one Recruiterflow job by its job ID.

includeStages.description: Whether Recruiterflow should include job pipeline stages.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving a Recruiterflow job.

job.description: One raw Recruiterflow record returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a Recruiterflow job.

actions.name: get_user
actions.description: Get one Recruiterflow user by user ID or email address.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving a Recruiterflow user.

user.description: One raw Recruiterflow record returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a Recruiterflow user.

actions.name: list_candidates
actions.description: List Recruiterflow candidates with optional pagination and inclusion flags.

itemsPerPage.description: The number of records to return per page.

includeCount.description: Whether Recruiterflow should include total item counts.

includeFiles.description: Whether Recruiterflow should include candidate file metadata.

includeNotes.description: Whether Recruiterflow should include candidate notes.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Recruiterflow candidates.

items.description: One raw Recruiterflow record returned by the API.

candidates.description: The Recruiterflow candidates returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The total number of matching records when Recruiterflow returns it.
Recruiterflow candidate rank metadata when returned.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Recruiterflow candidates.

actions.name: list_jobs
actions.description: List Recruiterflow jobs with optional pagination and inclusion flags.

itemsPerPage.description: The number of records to return per page.

includeCount.description: Whether Recruiterflow should include total item counts.

includeNotes.description: Whether Recruiterflow should include job notes in each record.

includeDescription.description: Whether Recruiterflow should include job descriptions in each record.

onlyOpen.description: Whether to return only open jobs.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Recruiterflow jobs.

items.description: One raw Recruiterflow record returned by the API.

jobs.description: The Recruiterflow jobs returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The total number of matching records when Recruiterflow returns it.
The total number of current openings when Recruiterflow returns it.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Recruiterflow jobs.

actions.name: list_users
actions.description: List Recruiterflow users in the connected workspace.

includeCount.description: Whether Recruiterflow should include total user counts.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Recruiterflow users.

items.description: One raw Recruiterflow record returned by the API.

users.description: The Recruiterflow users returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The total number of matching records when Recruiterflow returns it.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Recruiterflow users.
